Presenting the Academic Workshop Zola Theme

For workshops, seminars, and academic events

Website GitHub

About

This is an Eleventy port of the original Academic Workshop theme.

  • Theme: Academic Workshop
  • Original author: Alexander Terenin
  • Demo: https://aterenin.github.io/academic-workshop
This website is built using Eleventy and the Academic Workshop theme, which is designed to last.
